title: Stoeberia rupis-arcuatae
taxonomy: Stoeberia rupis-arcuatae is a species of succulent plant in the family Aizoaceae. The plant is native to South Africa, where it grows in rocky areas. It is a member of the genus Stoeberia, which includes several other species of succulents. The classification of Stoeberia rupis-arcuatae places it within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. As a member of the Aizoaceae family, Stoeberia rupis-arcuatae is also part of the order Caryophyllales.
